scripts.build:dev: NODE_ENV=development node build.mjs --dev && NODE_OPTIONS=--enable-source-maps node dist/cli-dev.js
scripts.release:version: npm run build:dev -- -a full-auto 'update the CLI_VERSION in deyad-cli/src/utils/session.ts and the version in package.json to the next value.'
scripts.release: npm run release:readme && npm run release:version && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.analyze: node build.mjs && echo '=== Bundle Size ===' && ls -lhS dist/*.js && echo '=== Module Breakdown ===' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.statSync('dist/cli.js');console.log('cli.js:',Math.round(s.size/1024)+'KB')"
